name: Deviled Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Hellmann's Real Mayonnaise or Low Fat Mayonnaise Dressing
1/3 Cup Hellmann's Dijonnaise Creamy Mustard Blend
2 Pounds Potatoes, Cooked and Peeled (About 5 Cups), Cut Into 1/2-inch Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise, creamy mustard blend, vinegar, sugar, and salt. Add the potatoes, celery, red onion, and eggs; toss gently to coat. Cover and chill.
2. If desired, spoon into a lettuce-lined bowl and garnish with cherry tomatoes.
